message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-29489-gem-install-grpc-1-45-0-takes-lot-of-time-to-complete",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete",
+    "description": "gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?\n\nRuby 3.1.1 \n\n`gem install grpc:1.45.0`\n\n### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?\n\n* M1 osx (no issue - all fine)\n* AWS hosted Ubuntu 20.04 VM with 4GB Ram & SSD."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete",
+        "description": "This adds pre-built library for aarch64 linux, will help improve the install speed and avoid building environment issues at customer side.\n\n  Can you help build and push the new rake compiler image?\nWill update the tag and hash after the image is available\n\nManually tested locally:\n```\nuname\n```yaml\nFROM ruby:3.1.1\nRUN gem install grpc:1.45.0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This adds pre-built library for aarch64 linux, will help improve the install speed and avoid building environment issues at customer side.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "FROM ruby:3.1.1\nRUN gem install grpc:1.45.0",
+        "uname -a\nLinux u20 5.15.49-linuxkit #1 SMP PREEMPT Tue Sep 13 07:51:32 UTC 2022 aarch64 aarch64 aarch64 GNU/Linux",
+        "time gem install /work/ruby/grpc/pkg/grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux.gem\nSuccessfully installed grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux\nParsing documentation for grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux\nInstalling ri documentation for grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux\nDone installing documentation for grpc after 0 seconds\n1 gem installed\n\nreal\t0m22.794s\nuser\t0m17.268s\nsys\t0m5.156s"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
